entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The cereal crop being studied for the glossy trait

entities.name: GLOSSY TRAIT
entities.description: Morphological trait in sorghum seedlings characterized by light yellow green and shining leaf surfaces

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC STUDY
entities.description: The research method used to screen the world sorghum germplasm collection

entities.name: GERMPLASM COLLECTION
entities.description: The set of sorghum accessions screened for the glossy trait

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country of origin for a large proportion of glossy sorghum lines

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: Country of origin for some glossy sorghum lines

entities.name: SUDAN
entities.description: Country of origin for some glossy sorghum lines

entities.description: Country of origin for some glossy sorghum lines

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: Country of origin for some glossy sorghum lines

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: Country of origin for some glossy sorghum lines

entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: Country of origin for some glossy sorghum lines

entities.name: SOUTH AFRICA
entities.description: Country of origin for some glossy sorghum lines

entities.name: MEXICO
entities.description: Country of origin for some glossy sorghum lines

entities.name: DURRA GROUP
entities.description: Taxonomic group of sorghum where most glossy lines are found

entities.name: GUINEA GROUP
entities.description: Taxonomic group of sorghum containing some glossy lines

entities.name: CAUDATUM GROUP
entities.description: Taxonomic group of sorghum containing some glossy lines

entities.name: BICOLOR GROUP
entities.description: Taxonomic group of sorghum containing some glossy lines

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD SENSITIVITY
entities.description: Agronomic attribute associated with many glossy sorghum lines

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: Morphological attribute varying from very tall to dwarf in glossy sorghum lines

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: Agronomic attribute varying from early to extremely late in glossy sorghum lines

entities.name: SHOOTFLY RESISTANCE
entities.description: Trait of resistance to shootfly pests contributed to by the glossy trait

entities.name: DROUGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: Trait of resistance to drought in seedlings contributed to by the glossy trait

entities.name: SHOOTFLY
entities.description: The organism that causes damage to sorghum, which the glossy trait helps resist

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: The environmental condition that the glossy trait helps sorghum seedlings resist

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The institution where source material for the glossy trait is maintained
